title: Gree U-Match R32 diagnostic codes
description: Complete 107-code diagnostic catalog for Gree U-Match R32 3.5-16kW systems, with practical troubleshooting for the 22 codes covered by detailed procedures.
sourceName: Gree U-Match R32 Service Manual EN 3.5-16kW
sourceReference: Section 3.3 Error Code and section 3.4 Troubleshooting
notes: Audited against GC202209-I in ED-24UMATCH.1-2. U-Match remains a semi-commercial split family and is not mixed with GMV VRF packages.
